title: Privacy & Data
description: Manage your privacy preferences and data.

toast.saveErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please check your connection.
toast.exportDescription: We will email you when your data is ready to download.
toast.clearedDescription: Your mock interview history has been permanently removed.

privacy.heading: Privacy settings
privacy.description: Manage your data and privacy preferences.

locationMetadata.label: Location metadata
locationMetadata.description: Allow the app to use coarse location metadata (city/region) to improve product experiences.

improveApp.label: Help improve the app
improveApp.description: Allow the use of your sessions to train and improve our AI model.

marketingEmails.label: Marketing emails
marketingEmails.description: Occasional updates about new features, templates, and tips.

privacy.footer: Learn how your information is protected when using our product, and visit our Privacy Center and Privacy Policy for more details.

cookies.heading: Cookies & tracking
cookies.description: Control what's collected during your session. Required cookies keep you signed in and can't be turned off.

required.label: Required
required.description: Authentication, fraud prevention, and core functionality.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Aggregated, anonymous metrics on which features people use.

performance.label: Performance monitoring
performance.description: Crash and slowdown reports to help us fix issues faster.

data.heading: Your data
data.description: Take a copy with you, or remove specific data without deleting your account.

export.label: Export your data
export.description: Download a copy of your resumes, transcripts, and settings as a ZIP. Ready in a few minutes.

clearHistory.label: Clear mock interview history
clearHistory.description: Removes all transcripts and audio recordings. Your resumes and account are unaffected.
